headline: Bezos’ Physical AI Lab Has Closed Round at $38 Billion Value
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Project Prometheus, the artificial intelligence lab that Amazon.com Inc. founder Jeff Bezos is leading with Google veteran Vik Bajaj, has closed a $10 billion funding round that values the company at roughly $38 billion, according to a person familiar with the situation.Most Read from BloombergAnthropic’s Mythos Model Is Being Accessed by Unauthorized UsersInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Screaming and Employees Looking for the ExitTrump Encourages Companies Not to Seek Tariff

headline: BX's Q1 Earnings Top as AUM Hits Record High Despite Tough Environment
summary: Blackstone beats Q1 2026 earnings estimates as fee-earning AUM climbs to $937.6B and total AUM hits $1.3T, even as GAAP expenses rises.

headline: SEI Investments Beats on Q1 Earnings as Revenues & AUM Rise Y/Y
summary: SEIC posts strong Q1 results with earnings beat and rising AUM, though higher expenses weigh on overall gains.

headline: The Iran Cease-Fire Rallied Markets but There Are 4 Other Factors Keeping Investors Optimistic
summary: Investors breathed a sigh of relief this week when President Donald Trump indefinitely extended the cease-fire with Iran.  After a nail-biting back and forth that included delaying a peace-talk trip to Islamabad, the president wrote on social media that he was extending both the cease-fire and the U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz “until such a time” that Iran comes up with a unified proposal.  Experts say there are four main factors fueling the current bull market that are likely to continue in the near term: strong earnings, a resilient consumer, a new scramble for alternative energy, and historically low market reactivity to geopolitical cycles.
